name: HT Bus Svc
officers: Yitzchak Nisenbaum (principal, per D&B for related entity Hasaot Talmidim Inc)
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue Business Records (not directly accessed; Bizapedia/D&B references found)
notes: FMCSA SAFER snapshot shows USDOT 3454688, MC-1125751 for HT BUS SERVICES INC, DBA HASAOT TALMIDIM, located at 253 River Ave, Lakewood, NJ (not 688 Cross St as in input; possible separate yard/office). USDOT operating status active; one source notes 'Authorized For Hire' with passenger authority, while another extract noted 'Not Authorized' for interstate for-hire — the BrokerSnapshot/bubba.ai data confirms Authorized For Hire passenger. FMCSA registration effective 7/16/2020 (this is FMCSA registration, not state inc date). NJ Sunbiz/Treasury entity search not directly viewable via WebFetch (CAPTCHA blocked). 22 school buses, 18 drivers per MCS-150.

name: DATTCO School Bus
inc_date: 1924 (founded as MASTCO; CT corporate filing date unverified)
registry_source: CT Secretary of State Business Records (entity ID 0083075 referenced; not directly accessed due to access restrictions)
notes: DATTCO INC, USDOT 61222, MC-95466, is the parent operator of DATTCO School Bus division. Principal address per FMCSA is 583 South St, New Britain, CT; the Windsor facility at 101 Baker Hollow Rd is a school bus operating yard. Satisfactory safety rating dated 8/12/2025. Fleet (1,746 power units, 1,625 drivers) covers school bus + motorcoach + Megabus combined under one USDOT. Company founded in 1924 as MASTCO; rebranded DATTCO in 1960s after D&T acquisition. CT entity ID 0083075 (per b2bhint reference); CT SOS Business Records Search would confirm exact incorporation/filing date.

name: Holland Bus Svc LLC
registry_source: Michigan LARA Business Entity Search (not directly accessed; no Holland Bus Service LLC found in available data)
notes: No confident FMCSA SAFER match. SAFER keyword searches for 'HOLLAND BUS', 'HOLLAND BUS SERVICE' returned no results. The only Holland, MI 'Holland Bus' entity readily found is Holland Bus Company (school bus dealer/parts/service, 670 E 16th St — Blue Bird dealer, NOT a transportation operator). Address 1117 Legion Ct, Holland, MI 49423 is a residential property (per Redfin/Ownerly) where Hirisco LLC (a small business services company, est. 2008, ~2 employees) is registered — appears unrelated to school bus operations. Possibility: Holland Bus Svc LLC is a very small private/residential-registered entity that does not appear under that exact name in FMCSA SAFER or in public web records, or the input may reflect inaccurate/outdated data. Michigan LARA MiBusiness Registry would be the authoritative source but was not directly accessible via WebFetch (403). Recommend manual lookup at mibusinessregistry.lara.state.mi.us.

name: Visser Bus Svc
inc_date: 2010 (per multiple secondary sources; CA SOS not directly accessed for exact date)
entity_status: active (per BBB/D&B; not directly verified at CA SOS)
registry_source: California Secretary of State bizfileOnline (not directly accessed; LeadIQ/Crunchbase/D&B references)
notes: VISSER BUS SERVICES INC, USDOT 2722416, intrastate-only CA carrier. FMCSA principal address is 1469 W 9th St, Upland, CA (yard/office in adjacent city); the input address 6062 East Ave, Rancho Cucamonga, CA matches the company's secondary/operational address per D&B. 155 power units, 155 drivers per MCS-150. No safety rating assigned. School bus contractor servicing Southern California districts — per company website, '45+ years' experience but formal entity reportedly founded 2010 (so this may be a successor entity to an older operation). MC number not listed in SAFER (intrastate-only operations do not require MC). CA SOS bizfileOnline would provide exact formation date and entity number.

name: Gold Coast Bus Svc
registry_source: Tennessee Secretary of State Business Entity Search (not directly accessed)
notes: No confident FMCSA SAFER match for a Memphis, TN-based 'Gold Coast Bus Service' carrier. SAFER keyword searches returned no records for 'GOLD COAST BUS'. Found unrelated 'Gold Coast' carriers in SAFER (Gold Coast Logistics LLC USDOT 3645083; Gold Coast Express LLC USDOT 3486194; Gold Coast Transport LLC USDOT 3513287; GoldCoast Carriers Inc USDOT 3014047; Gold Coast Carriers Inc USDOT 3349404) — none confirmed in Memphis, TN, and none are passenger/school bus operators based on names. Address 3426 S Perkins Rd, Memphis, TN 38118 did not surface in any FMCSA/web records as a school bus operating location. The entity may exist as a very small operator below FMCSA registration thresholds (intrastate non-CDL), may operate under a different legal name, or may be inactive/closed. TN SOS business entity search (tncab.tnsos.gov) and Memphis-area school district contractor lists would be authoritative next steps.
